title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.305 - Supplemental tax book same validity and force
text:
137.305.  Supplemental tax book same validity and force. — Any such subsequent supplemental tax book shall have the same validity and force and entail the same obligations and penalties as the tax book made at the regular time under the provisions of this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 11051, A.L. 1945 p. 1817) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9879; 1919 § 12871; 1909 § 11428
